title: LightningMod
description: A simple mod that gives you the ability to control how many lightning bolts appear during thunder
body:
# Lightning Mod

**Description:**

The Lightning Mod enhances your Minecraft experience by increasing the frequency of lightning strikes during thunderstorms.

## Features

- **Configurable Lightning Frequency**: Adjust the chance of lightning strikes during a thunderstorm. Make them incredibly frequent or extremely rare using a simple slider. The lower the value, the more often lightning will strike.
- **Skeleton Horse Control**: Modify the spawn chance of the "Skeleton Trap" horses that appear from lightning strikes. You can reduce the chance or disable them completely.
- **All-Biome Lightning**: Enable an option to allow lightning to strike in any biome during a thunderstorm, including deserts, savannas, and mesas. No more safe havens from the storm!
- **In-Game Configuration**: All settings can be easily changed in-game through the ModMenu settings screen, powered by Cloth Config.
- **Compatibility with Fabric and Paper**: Works seamlessly on both Fabric and Paper servers.

## Installation

### For Fabric
1. Install Fabric Loader and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
2. Download and install [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (for Minecraft versions 1.21.11 and below, use [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)).
3. Place the mod file in the `mods` folder in your Minecraft directory.

### For Paper
1. Download the latest version of Paper from the [official website](https://papermc.io/downloads).
2. Place the mod file in the `plugins` folder in your Minecraft server directory.
3. Start the server to enable plugin.

## Configuration

(for Fabric) The configuration file can be found in `config/lightningmod.json` or use Mod Menu.

(for Paper) `plugins/LightningMod/config.yml`.
